message:
Upgrade plan to V5.0: hybrid architecture with pragmatic engineering

V5.0 incorporates best elements from both Opus and Codex approaches:

- Add Executive Blueprint (Part 0): mission, non-goals, three-ring architecture
- Add workspace layout (9 crates): ftui-core/render/style/text/layout/runtime/widgets/extras/harness
- Add kernel invariants: cleanup guaranteed, cursor correctness, width correctness
- Add design decisions/ADRs: Frame canonical, inline-first, presenter emits runs
- Add quality gates: inline stability, diff correctness, unicode width, PTY cleanup
- Add unsafe containment policy: safe default, feature-gated SIMD
- Fix presenter to use row-major runs (not per-cell cursor moves)
- Add inline-mode policy with cursor-save/restore contract
- Add testing/verification chapter: unit, property, snapshot, PTY, fuzz
- Add migration map: source → ftui crate mappings
- Add risk register with mitigations

This transforms the theoretical V4.0 into an implementable engineering plan.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
